title: Effects for third persons
doc_html:
Art. 1985. Effects for third persons

            Contracts may produce effects for third persons only when provided by law.

            Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985; Acts 2025, No. 488, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 1985.  Effects for third persons
Contracts may produce effects for third persons only when provided by law.
Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985; Acts 2025, No. 488, §1.
